name: connectMS
notes: Export ord2: parse host:port; socket()+connect() TCP to matchmaker; sends client hello. Not-connected/proto errors 0x3EB/0x3EC.

name: initializeMS
notes: Export ord7: opcode 'u' — upload initial player record + volume-serial (GetVolumeInformation) registration handshake; expects 'OK'.

name: loginMShost
notes: Export ord9: opcode 'h' — login as game host; ResumeThread on the receive worker (DAT_10020BD0+0x28).

name: loginMSPlayer
notes: Export ord8: opcode 'p' — login as player; SuspendThread on the host worker.

name: requestMSgame
notes: Export ord10: opcode 'r' — request game list; reads 'P' records (ntohl length-prefixed) into linked list at DAT_10020BD8.

name: selectMSgame
notes: Export ord12: opcode 's' — select game by id (rec+0x10); expects 'O' ack.

name: deselectMSgame
notes: Export ord3: opcode 'd' — deselect game by id (rec+0x10).

name: resetMSfilter
notes: Export ord11: opcode 't' — reset game-list filter/cursor; marks list dirty (DAT_1001D0A0=1).

name: updateMSgame
notes: Export ord14: opcode 'u' — upload/update the player-or-game record (DAT_10020C10 bytes).

name: fetchMSgame
notes: Export ord4: opcode 'f' — fetch one game record by id; reads 'P' payload of DAT_10020C10 bytes.

name: sendMSresults
notes: Export ord13: opcode 'v' — send mission-results blob (u32 length + data); expects 'O' ack.

name: getMSdatafilesize
notes: Export ord6: opcode 'z' — query server data-file size by name; reads u32 size; expects 'O'.

name: getMSdatafile
notes: Export ord5: opcode 'x' — download server data-file by name into buffer; client acks 'O', expects 'K'.

name: closeMS
notes: Export ord1: opcode 'l' — quit/logout; closesocket; frees game list + DeleteCriticalSection.

name: ms_recv_all
notes: recv() exactly N bytes in a loop ('Read Packet Error - Correcting...' on short read).

name: ms_send_all
notes: send() exactly N bytes in a loop ('Send Packet Error - Correcting...' on short write).

name: ms_recv_u32
notes: recv 4 bytes then ntohl -> host u32 (network-order length prefix).

name: ms_send_u32
notes: htonl then send 4 bytes (network-order length prefix).

name: ms_disconnect
notes: Receive-worker teardown: send 'l' quit opcode, closesocket, free game list + critical section.

name: ms_reg_open
notes: Open HKLM SOFTWARE\... registry keys for the server data-file cache (RegCreateKeyExA).
